---
name: Spec bug
about: Report an inconsistency, ambiguity, or error in the VCP specification
title: "[spec-bug] "
labels: ["spec-bug"]
---

## Section reference

Which part of `SPECIFICATION.md` or which schema in `schemas/` is affected?
(e.g. §7 Grants, `manifest.schema.json`)

## What's wrong

Describe the inconsistency, ambiguity, or error. If two sections contradict each
other, quote both.

## Suggested fix

How should it read instead? If this changes a normative MUST/SHOULD or a schema,
note that — it may need to go through the [RFC process](../../rfcs/README.md)
rather than a direct fix.
